title: Vermillion Bird Divine Sect
content:
Vermillion Bird Divine Sect
 is a branch of the 
Four Divine Sect
. It is currently the strongest branch as it is the only one with a Divine Emperor present.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

3

Items

4

Techniques

4.1

Vermillion Bird Holy Weapon Styles

4.2

Nine Mysterious Transformation

Background
[
]

During the war against the 
Cultivation Alliance
 and the 
Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
, the Azure Dragon Divine Sect's Emperor disappeared; the Black Tortoise Divine Sect's Emperor turned traitor; and the White Tiger Divine Sect's Emperor died in battle. Only the Vermillion Bird Divine Sect's Emperor survived.

History
[
]

Vermillion Bird Divine Sect came out of seclusion when 
Wang Lin
 achieved first awakening of his Vermillion Bird mark. 
Lu Yun
 sent six elders and most of the second step cultivators to the East Demon Spirit Sea to escort Wang Lin back to the sect, safely.

When Wang Lin achieved second awakening of his Vermillion Bird mark, Lu Yun personally went in his origin soul form to escort Wang Lin back to the sect, safely. Along the way, he even brought along the elders of the three other divine sects and the Holy Weapons of the three other divine sects.

After Wang Lin was safely back at the 
Holy Vermillion Bird Planet
, Lu Yun had him absorb fire origin energy from the Vermillion Bird Holy Weapon along with his own origin energy for three years. This allowed him to achieve the first of the Nine Mysterious Transformations which is something each Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor is required to achieve to be crowned.

Items
[
]

Cloak of the Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor

Vermillion Bird Holy Treasure

Techniques
[
]

Vermillion Bird Holy Weapon Styles
[
]

First Style:
 Southern Vermillion Bird Bingding Fire

Second Style:
 Holy Treasures to fuse into one, Ding Earth

Third Style:
 Fire Haven

Nine Mysterious Transformation
[
]

Legacy technique inherited by each generation's Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor

Rise Three Realm Flame Origin

Fire Burn
